commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6beb991b19d2d8855a6959d62d7269ca2937256b)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a Rust `launcher/` interactive menu and root `launcher:build` script that wrap `openclaw tui`, `dashboard`, `update`, and `gateway` commands, while adding several root markdown/workspace files.

PR surface: Docs +279, Config 0, Other +375. Total +654 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the PR head shows the script replacement, root artifact additions, dashboard preflight duplication, and version command mismatch. I did not run the launcher in this read-only review, but the screenshot also shows the version as `unknown`.
commands.review_followup: - This should stay human-led until maintainers decide whether core should own a Cargo launcher surface; the mechanical cleanup is clear but product ownership remains unresolved.

target.title: feat: add interactive launcher menu as thin wrapper over existing CLI
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Users need a simple interactive menu to launch OpenClaw without remembering CLI commands. This PR adds a thin wrapper launcher that provides a friendly menu UX while delegating all operations to existing audited CLI commands.

## Why This Change Was Made

The launcher provides a single double-click entry point for common operations (TUI, WebUI, update, gateway management) without duplicating any existing OpenClaw surfaces. All sensitive operations remain in the existing audited code paths.

## User Impact

- **Interactive menu**: Run launcher to see TUI/WebUI/Update/Gateway options
- **No security risks**: Token handling remains in `openclaw dashboard`, no plaintext storage
- **No destructive operations**: Update delegates to `openclaw update` safe path
- **Proper service management**: Gateway uses `openclaw gateway install` (launchd/systemd/schtasks)

## Evidence

### Delegation Map
| Launcher Menu | Delegated To |
|--------------|--------------|
| [1] TUI | `openclaw tui` |
| [2] WebUI | `openclaw dashboard` |
| [3] Update | `openclaw update` |
| [4] Gateway | `openclaw gateway start/stop/restart/install` |

### What This PR Adds
- `launcher/src/main.rs` (347 lines) - Thin wrapper with interactive menu
- `launcher/README.md` - Documentation
- `launcher/Cargo.toml` - Rust project config
- `package.json` - Added `launcher:build` script

### What This PR Does NOT Do
- No plaintext token storage
- No custom git/pnpm operations
- No child-process gateway spawning
- No duplicate macOS packaging
- No custom updater logic

All operations delegate to existing canonical `openclaw` CLI commands.
target.author: sangjiexun

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
